song.title: Hark the Glad Sound
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Hark, the glad sound! the Savior comes, The Savior promised long; Let every heart prepare a throne, And every voice a song.
[V2] 2) He comes the pris’ners to release In Satan’s bondage held; The gates of brass before Him burst, The iron fetters yield.
[V3] 3) He comes, from dark’ning scales of vice, To clear the inward sight, And on the eyes oppressed with night To pour celestial light.
[V4] 4) He comes the broken heart to bind, The bleeding soul to cure; And with the treasures of His grace To bless the humble poor.
[V5] 5) Our glad Hosannas, Prince of Peace, Thy welcome shall proclaim; And heav’n’s exalted arches ring With Thy belovéd Name.
song.author: Philip Doddridge, Thomas Haweis
